general.name: Nudge
general.description: Standard Nudge configuration for general population
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7A9324DB-0BEA-4A14-B061-85459AF3FDFD</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7A9324DB-0BEA-4A14-B061-85459AF3FDFD</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Nudge</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Standard Nudge configuration for general population</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C1C1F0C1-3A98-402F-992E-DD4989BF6DDF</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C1C1F0C1-3A98-402F-992E-DD4989BF6DDF</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.github.macadmins.Nudge</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>osVersionRequirements</key><array><dict><key>actionButtonPath</key><string>jamfselfservice://content?entity=policy&id=569&action=execute</string><key>majorUpgradeAppPath</key><string>jamfselfservice://content?entity=policy&id=569&action=execute</string><key>requiredInstallationDate</key><string>2024-05-22T00:00:00Z</string><key>requiredMinimumOSVersion</key><string>14.3</string></dict></array><key>optionalFeatures</key><dict><key>aggressiveUserExperience</key><true/><key>aggressiveUserFullScreenExperience</key><false/><key>attemptToFetchMajorUpgrade</key><false/><key>disableSoftwareUpdateWorkflow</key><true/><key>acceptableApplicationBundleIDs</key><array><string>us.zoom.xos</string><string>com.jamfsoftware.selfservice.mac</string></array></dict><key>userExperience</key><dict><key>allowGracePeriods</key><true/><key>allowedDeferralsUntilForcedSecondaryQuitButton</key><integer>14</integer><key>approachingRefreshCycle</key><integer>6000</integer><key>approachingWindowTime</key><integer>72</integer><key>elapsedRefreshCycle</key><integer>300</integer><key>gracePeriodInstallDelay</key><integer>24</integer><key>gracePeriodLaunchDelay</key><integer>48</integer><key>gracePeriodPath</key><string>/private/var/db/.AppleSetupDone</string><key>imminentRefreshCycle</key><integer>600</integer><key>imminentWindowTime</key><integer>24</integer><key>initialRefreshCycle</key><integer>18000</integer><key>maxRandomDelayInSeconds</key><integer>1200</integer><key>nudgeRefreshCycle</key><integer>60</integer><key>randomDelay</key><true/></dict><key>userInterface</key><dict><key>actionButtonPath</key><string>jamfselfservice://content?entity=policy&id=569&action=execute</string><key>iconDarkPath</key><string>/Users/Shared/SCS_LOGO.jpg</string><key>iconLightPath</key><string>/Users/Shared/SCS_LOGO.jpg</string><key>showDeferralCount</key><true/><key>updateElements</key><array><dict><key>mainContentSubHeader</key><string>Updates can take around 45 minutes to complete</string><key>subHeader</key><string>A friendly reminder from your SCS IT team</string></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: OS - Under Sonoma and checked-in recently
